prompt.name: Coherence Coach Track — S7.1 MRT 微随机实验框架
prompt.sub_stage_name: MRT 微随机实验框架 — 随机分配 + 贝叶斯因果效应估计 + 实验合约
prompt.role: 你是 Coherence Coach Track S7.1 实现者。 你的任务是：实现 MRT（Micro-Randomized Trial）微随机实验框架， 包含随机变体分配、贝叶斯因果效应估计、实验记录写入 ledger， 并新建 contracts/causal_governance.json 合约（draft 状态）。 这是 Phase 7 的因果推理层基石。
prompt.context:
已有相关代码和数据源： - src/coach/agent.py: CoachAgent — 运行时，act() 方法输出 action packet - src/coach/composer.py: PolicyComposer — 动作类型路由，已有 TTM/SDT/Flow 融合 - src/coach/state.py: UserStateTracker — 用户状态（含 session 时间戳） - src/coach/data.py: 三层图谱 — facts/entity_profiles/events 表 - src/inner/ledger/event_store.py: EventStore — append_event 写事件到 ledger - contracts/gates.json: gate 5 (causal_gate) 已定义 causal_diagnostics_triple 指标 - config/coach_defaults.yaml: 已有 Phase 1-6 配置段
MRT 微随机实验理论（来自自适应AI伴学.txt）： ``` MRT 在低风险动作上随机施加 2 种变体（A/B）： - 每 24 小时窗口内，随机选择 20% 的 flow 动作做变体 - 变体仅影响"如何提供"（风格/措辞/时机），不影响"提供什么"（内容安全） - 记录 variant_id + outcome_metrics 到 ledger - 贝叶斯更新因果效应估计（参考 pyBKT 的贝叶斯方法） ```
四门禁数据源（S7.3 使用，S7.1 不需实现）： - Verification Load Gate: CoachAgent 计时（act() 执行时间） - Serendipity Gate: excursion 记录（Phase 3 excursion_right） - Trespassing Gate: 语义安全审计（Phase 5） - Manipulation Gate: 选择架构审计（Phase 2 data model）
prompt.task: 1) 新建 contracts/causal_governance.json（status=draft, v1.0.0） 2) 实现 src/coach/mrt.py：MRT 框架（MRTConfig + MRTAssignment + MRTTracker + BayesianEstimator） 3) 追加 config/coach_defaults.yaml Phase 7 配置段 4) 新增 tests/test_s7_mrt.py 5) 不实现诊断或门禁（S7.2/S7.3），不集成到 CoachAgent（S7.4）

implementation_steps.step:
新建 contracts/causal_governance.json，定义 MRT 实验设计和三诊断合约：
```json { "contract": "causal_governance", "version": "1.0.0", "status": "draft", "description": "因果稳健 + 治理闭环合约 — Phase 7 冻结", "mrt": { "description": "微随机实验框架设计参数", "randomization_rate": 0.2, "window_hours": 24, "eligible_action_types": ["challenge", "probe", "reflect", "scaffold"], "excluded_action_types": ["suggest", "defer"], "variant_schema": { "fields": { "variant_id": "string — 变体标识 (A/B/C)", "variant_name": "string — 变体名称", "delta": {"type": "float", "description": "相对基线的偏移量 [-1, 1]"}, "dimension": "string — 变体维度 (style/timing/pacing)" } }, "outcome_metrics": ["engagement_score", "completion_rate", "satisfaction_rating"], "estimation_method": "bayesian", "min_sample_per_variant": 10 }, "diagnostics": { "description": "升档前三诊断合约", "balance_check": { "description": "变体组 vs 对照组基线可比性检验", "method": "standardized_mean_difference", "smd_threshold": 0.25, "covariates": ["prior_engagement", "skill_level", "session_count"] }, "negative_control": { "description": "已知无效干预不应检测出显著性效果", "method": "bayesian_posterior_overlap", "overlap_threshold": 0.8, "min_control_events": 5 }, "placebo_window": { "description": "真实干预前窗口不应检测出效果", "window_hours_before": 2, "method": "pre_trend_test", "p_value_threshold": 0.05 } }, "frozen_at": null } ```
关键设计决策： - randomization_rate=0.2: 每 24h 窗口最多 20% 的符合条件的动作为变体 - suggest/defer 排除：suggest 为默认动作太轻量，defer 为退出动作不适合实验 - smd_threshold=0.25: 标准化均值差 > 0.25 认为不平衡（Cohen 标准小效应） - overlap_threshold=0.8: 后验分布重叠 > 80% 认为无显著差异

在 config/coach_defaults.yaml 追加：
```yaml # ── Phase 7: 因果稳健 + 治理闭环 ────────────────── mrt: enabled: false randomization_rate: 0.2 window_hours: 24 eligible_action_types: - challenge - probe - reflect - scaffold outcome_metrics: - engagement_score - completion_rate - satisfaction_rating estimation: min_sample_per_variant: 10 confidence_level: 0.95
diagnostics: enabled: false balance_check: smd_threshold: 0.25 negative_control: overlap_threshold: 0.8 min_control_events: 5 placebo_window: window_hours_before: 2 p_value_threshold: 0.05 ```

step.name: 实现 mrt.py — MRT 框架

implementation_steps.step:
新建 src/coach/mrt.py，包含以下类：
```python """S7.1 MRT 微随机实验框架。
在低风险 flow 动作上实施微随机实验，贝叶斯估计因果效应。 """ import hashlib import json import random import time from dataclasses import dataclass, field from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone from typing import Any
@dataclass class MRTConfig: """MRT 实验配置，默认值来自合约。""" randomization_rate: float = 0.2 window_hours: int = 24 eligible_action_types: tuple = ("challenge", "probe", "reflect", "scaffold") excluded_action_types: tuple = ("suggest", "defer") outcome_metrics: tuple = ("engagement_score", "completion_rate", "satisfaction_rating") min_sample_per_variant: int = 10 confidence_level: float = 0.95
@classmethod def from_dict(cls, d: dict) -> "MRTConfig": return cls( randomization_rate=d.get("randomization_rate", 0.2), window_hours=d.get("window_hours", 24), eligible_action_types=tuple(d.get("eligible_action_types", ["challenge", "probe", "reflect", "scaffold"])), outcome_metrics=tuple(d.get("outcome_metrics", ["engagement_score", "completion_rate", "satisfaction_rating"])), min_sample_per_variant=d.get("estimation", {}).get("min_sample_per_variant", 10), )
@dataclass class MRTAssignment: """单次 MRT 变体分配结果。""" variant_id: str | None # None = control (no variant) variant_name: str | None is_variant: bool # True = 被分配到变体组 delta: float = 0.0 # 相对基线的偏移量 dimension: str = "style" # 变体维度 trace_id: str = "" # 关联的动作 trace_id window_id: str = "" # 24h 窗口标识 assigned_at_utc: str = ""
def to_dict(self) -> dict: return { "variant_id": self.variant_id, "variant_name": self.variant_name, "is_variant": self.is_variant, "delta": self.delta, "dimension": self.dimension, "trace_id": self.trace_id, "window_id": self.window_id, "assigned_at_utc": self.assigned_at_utc, }
class MRTExperiment: """MRT 实验管理器。
职责： - 检查动作是否在符合条件的 action_types 中 - 检查当前 24h 窗口的变体分配率是否 ≤ 20% - 随机决定是否分配变体 - 生成 variant_id 和 delta - 记录分配到 ledger """
VARIANTS = [ {"id": "A", "name": "鼓励型", "delta": 0.2, "dimension": "style"}, {"id": "B", "name": "反思型", "delta": -0.1, "dimension": "style"}, ]
def __init__(self, config: MRTConfig | None = None): self.config = config or MRTConfig() self._assignments: list[MRTAssignment] = [] # 当前窗口内的分配记录
def current_window_id(self) -> str: """计算当前 24h 窗口标识。""" now = datetime.now(timezone.utc) epoch = datetime(2024, 1, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc) elapsed_hours = (now - epoch).total_seconds() / 3600 window_index = int(elapsed_hours // self.config.window_hours) return f"win_{window_index:08d}"
def _window_assignments(self, window_id: str) -> list[MRTAssignment]: """获取当前窗口内已发生的分配。""" return [a for a in self._assignments if a.window_id == window_id]
def _window_variant_count(self, window_id: str) -> int: """当前窗口内变体分配数。""" return sum(1 for a in self._window_assignments(window_id) if a.is_variant)
def _window_total_count(self, window_id: str) -> int: """当前窗口内总分配数。""" return len(self._window_assignments(window_id))
def eligible(self, action_type: str) -> bool: """动作类型是否可参与 MRT。""" return action_type in self.config.eligible_action_types
def assign( self, action_type: str, context: dict | None = None, trace_id: str = "", ) -> MRTAssignment: """对给定动作分配变体（或对照组）。
流程： 1. 检查 eligibility 2. 检查窗口变体率 ≤ randomization_rate 3. 如果通过且随机命中 → 变体；否则 → 对照组 """ if not self.eligible(action_type): return MRTAssignment( variant_id=None, variant_name=None, is_variant=False, trace_id=trace_id, assigned_at_utc=datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(), )
window_id = self.current_window_id()
# 窗口变体率检查 total = self._window_total_count(window_id) variants = self._window_variant_count(window_id) current_rate = variants / total if total > 0 else 0
if current_rate >= self.config.randomization_rate: # 窗口已满，分配为对照 return MRTAssignment( variant_id=None, variant_name=None, is_variant=False, trace_id=trace_id, window_id=window_id, assigned_at_utc=datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(), )
# 随机确定是否变体 if random.random() < self.config.randomization_rate: variant = random.choice(self.VARIANTS) assignment = MRTAssignment( variant_id=variant["id"], variant_name=variant["name"], is_variant=True, delta=variant["delta"], dimension=variant["dimension"], trace_id=trace_id, window_id=window_id, assigned_at_utc=datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(), ) else: assignment = MRTAssignment( variant_id=None, variant_name=None, is_variant=False, trace_id=trace_id, window_id=window_id, assigned_at_utc=datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(), )
self._assignments.append(assignment) return assignment
def window_stats(self, window_id: str | None = None) -> dict: """返回当前/指定窗口的统计。""" wid = window_id or self.current_window_id() assigns = self._window_assignments(wid) total = len(assigns) variants = sum(1 for a in assigns if a.is_variant) return { "window_id": wid, "total_assignments": total, "variant_count": variants, "control_count": total - variants, "variant_rate": round(variants / total, 4) if total > 0 else 0.0, }
class BayesianEstimator: """贝叶斯因果效应估计器。
使用 Beta-Bernoulli 共轭先验对二值结果建模（pyBKT 启发的贝叶斯方法）。 对连续结果使用 Normal-Inverse-Gamma 模型。
输出后验均值 + 95% 可信区间，不做频率学派 p 值报告。 """
def __init__(self, alpha_prior: float = 1.0, beta_prior: float = 1.0): # Beta 先验参数 self.alpha_prior = alpha_prior self.beta_prior = beta_prior
def estimate_binary( self, variant_successes: int, variant_total: int, control_successes: int, control_total: int, ) -> dict: """二值结果的贝叶斯估计（如完成率）。
返回后验均值 + 95% 可信区间。 """ # 后验 a_v = self.alpha_prior + variant_successes b_v = self.beta_prior + variant_total - variant_successes a_c = self.alpha_prior + control_successes b_c = self.beta_prior + control_total - control_successes
# 后验均值 mean_v = a_v / (a_v + b_v) mean_c = a_c / (a_c + b_c) effect = mean_v - mean_c
# 近似 95% 可信区间（基于 Beta 分布方差） var_v = (a_v * b_v) / ((a_v + b_v) ** 2 * (a_v + b_v + 1)) var_c = (a_c * b_c) / ((a_c + b_c) ** 2 * (a_c + b_c + 1)) se = (var_v + var_c) ** 0.5 ci_lower = effect - 1.96 * se ci_upper = effect + 1.96 * se
# 后验重叠概率：P(treatment > control) overlap = self._posterior_overlap(a_v, b_v, a_c, b_c)
return { "method": "beta_binomial", "variant_mean": round(mean_v, 4), "control_mean": round(mean_c, 4), "effect_size": round(effect, 4), "ci_95": [round(ci_lower, 4), round(ci_upper, 4)], "posterior_overlap": round(overlap, 4), "variant_n": variant_total, "control_n": control_total, }
def _posterior_overlap(self, a1, b1, a2, b2, samples: int = 10000) -> float: """蒙特卡洛估计两个后验分布的重叠概率。""" import random as rnd overlap = 0 for _ in range(samples): s1 = rnd.betavariate(a1, b1) s2 = rnd.betavariate(a2, b2) if abs(s1 - s2) < 0.1: # 接近的重叠 overlap += 1 return overlap / samples ```
关键设计决策： - 使用 Beta-Bernoulli 共轭先验，与 pyBKT 的贝叶斯方法一致 - 不做频率学派 p 值——只报告后验均值 + 95% 可信区间 + 后验重叠概率 - 窗口机制基于 UTC 绝对时间计算，不受会话重启影响 - 变体只影响 style 维度（如何说），不影响 action_type（说什么）

新建 tests/test_s7_mrt.py：
```python """S7.1 MRT 微随机实验框架测试。"""
import pytest from src.coach.mrt import MRTConfig, MRTExperiment, BayesianEstimator
class TestMRTConfig: def test_default_config(self): cfg = MRTConfig() assert cfg.randomization_rate == 0.2 assert cfg.window_hours == 24 assert "challenge" in cfg.eligible_action_types
def test_from_dict(self): cfg = MRTConfig.from_dict({"randomization_rate": 0.5}) assert cfg.randomization_rate == 0.5
class TestMRTExperiment: def test_eligible_action_types(self): exp = MRTExperiment() assert exp.eligible("challenge") is True assert exp.eligible("suggest") is False
def test_assign_returns_control_for_ineligible(self): exp = MRTExperiment() result = exp.assign("suggest", trace_id="t1") assert result.is_variant is False assert result.variant_id is None
def test_assign_returns_assignment(self): exp = MRTExperiment() result = exp.assign("challenge", trace_id="t2") assert result.trace_id == "t2" assert result.window_id == exp.current_window_id() assert result.is_variant in (True, False)
def test_window_stats(self): exp = MRTExperiment() for i in range(10): exp.assign("challenge", trace_id=f"t{i}") stats = exp.window_stats() assert stats["total_assignments"] == 10 assert stats["variant_count"] + stats["control_count"] == 10
def test_window_rate_bound(self): """验证窗口变体率不超过 randomization_rate。""" exp = MRTExperiment(randomization_rate=0.5) # 分配大量动作验证上限 for i in range(100): exp.assign("challenge", trace_id=f"t{i}") stats = exp.window_stats() assert stats["variant_rate"] <= 0.5 + 0.05 # 允许 5% 松弛
class TestBayesianEstimator: def test_estimate_binary_positive_effect(self): est = BayesianEstimator() result = est.estimate_binary( variant_successes=8, variant_total=10, control_successes=4, control_total=10, ) assert result["effect_size"] > 0 assert "ci_95" in result assert "posterior_overlap" in result assert result["variant_n"] == 10
def test_estimate_binary_no_effect(self): est = BayesianEstimator() result = est.estimate_binary( variant_successes=5, variant_total=10, control_successes=5, control_total=10, ) assert abs(result["effect_size"]) < 0.15
def test_posterior_overlap_range(self): est = BayesianEstimator() result = est.estimate_binary(2, 10, 2, 10) assert 0 <= result["posterior_overlap"] <= 1.0 ```

file_change_summary.change: ~60 行: MRT + 三诊断合约 (status=draft)

prompt.success_criteria: 1. contracts/causal_governance.json 存在，JSON 格式有效，status="draft" 2. src/coach/mrt.py 存在，包含 MRTConfig/MRTExperiment/BayesianEstimator 三个类 3. MRTExperiment.assign() 正确区分 eligible/ineligible action_types 4. MRTExperiment.assign() 返回 assignment 包含 variant_id/is_variant/trace_id/window_id 5. MRTExperiment.window_stats() 返回正确的窗口统计 6. 窗口变体率不超过 randomization_rate（统计上限验证） 7. BayesianEstimator.estimate_binary() 返回 effect_size + ci_95 + posterior_overlap 8. config/coach_defaults.yaml 新增 Phase 7 配置段 9. 新增 tests/test_s7_mrt.py 全部 pass 10. 990 已有 tests 全部 pass 11. 不修改任何已冻结的文件
